Plant Biology

Urban Forestry

Plant Biology is designed to prepare students for graduate or

Total Credits

professional schools and/or a career in research. This area provides a strong foundation for postgraduate education and research careers in biotechnology, plant physiology and development, cell biology, molecular biology, plant genetics/genomics, conservation biology, ecology, and plant pathology.

1 With the exception of ENGL101 and ENGL393, a grade of "C-" or better

is required in the courses above.
